name: seo-toolkit
description: 20 skills for end-to-end SEO — keyword research + list dev + clustering/mapping, SERP & competitor analysis, on-page + technical audits, CWV, backlinks, content briefs, schema, GSC reporting, local SEO, plus structured-data entity modelling (entity-disambiguation, entity-relationship-mapper, knowledge-graph-builder).

seo_vault_passphrase.title: Vault passphrase
seo_vault_passphrase.description: Passphrase used to encrypt and decrypt your SEO provider credentials (SerpAPI, DataForSEO, Ahrefs, Moz, PSI, GSC, GA4). Stored in your OS keychain — never written to settings.json. Required before running /seo-toolkit:seo-connect or any data-backed skill.
